name: Microsoft Presidio
pricing_notes: Open source; self-hosted; no managed cloud service from Microsoft

auth.notes: Fully local execution; no external auth required

performance.notes: Local NLP pipeline; spaCy-based; ~30ms for typical paragraph-length text

agent_readiness.notes: PII detection and anonymization library. Detects 50+ entity types (names, addresses, SSN, credit cards, emails, etc.). Anonymizer applies redaction, replacement, encryption. 40+ supported languages. Docker image available. REST API wrapper for microservices.

gotchas: Custom recognizers require spaCy NLP knowledge
False positive rate requires threshold tuning
Model download required on first use (~200MB spaCy models)
best_when: LLM pipelines that must anonymize PII before sending to external APIs
Healthcare/financial applications with strict data handling requirements
Data pipelines scrubbing sensitive information from training data
Agents processing user inputs containing sensitive personal data
avoid_when: Simple regex-based redaction without NLP context
summary: Microsoft Presidio is an open-source PII detection and anonymization library with 50+ entity types (names, SSNs, credit cards, etc.) across 40+ languages. Built on spaCy NLP. Includes Analyzer (detect PII) and Anonymizer (redact/replace/encrypt). Essential for LLM pipelines that must protect sensitive data before sending to external APIs. Docker image for REST API deployment.
